action_text: Select "Short description" from the open filter field dropdown
rationale: We need to set the filter field to "Short description" to build the required condition.

action_text: Choose the "contains" operator for the filter condition
rationale: After choosing the field, we must define how to match it; "contains" is the correct operator for the requirement.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the filter value input
rationale: We must supply the target text to match in the filter value box.
Once the filter condition is configured, we need to execute it to see the filtered list.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the list Search box
rationale: As an alternative approach, use the list’s quick search (already scoped to Short description) to narrow results to the target string.
